device_name: Eclipse II with Smart Noise Cancellation
intended_use: The software performs digital enhancement of a radiographic image generated by an x-ray device. The software can be used to process adult and pediatric x-ray images. This excludes mammography applicat
intended_use_full: The software performs digital enhancement of a radiographic image generated by an x-ray device. The software can be used to process adult and pediatric x-ray images. This excludes mammography applications.
ground_truth: Board-certified radiologists' visual assessment using 5-point preference scale and 4-point RadLex diagnostic capability scale
other_metrics: Visual difference preference scale (-2 to +2) tied to diagnostic confidence; RadLex 4-point scale for overall diagnostic capability. Results demonstrate diagnostic quality images at 50% dose reduction for CsI and 40% dose reduction for GOS that are equivalent to or exceed nominal dose image quality.
